title: AoA_remnants
description: Restore nerfed weapons and equipment in AOA3
body:
AoA3 Remnants is an unofficial addon for Advent of Ascension (AoA3) that nostalgia-restores select classic gear and feel, and has already rewritten several AoA equipment effects into balanced sidegrades aligned with current AoA pacing.
Because AoA is not fully updated yet, some content may not be fully available in Survival; we will progressively enable Survival acquisition as upstream updates land.
Requires AoA3 (NeoForge/Forge depending on version). Not affiliated with the AoA team; no redistribution of AoA assets.
